title: Bursitis
license_notes: Use as public patient-education source support. Avoid verbatim copying into primitives.
supports: Bursitis is inflammation of a bursa near a joint.
Symptoms can include joint pain, tenderness, and swelling.
Supportive care can include rest, avoiding pressure, and clinician-directed pain control.
Fever, redness/warmth, septic joint concern, trauma, open wound, or immunocompromise require separate evaluation.
